name: VR Drums Ultimate Streamer
short_description: Customizable VR drum kit simulator. Pressure sensitive hits, foot pedals, unlimited spawning, multiple drum instruments, drum heads and cymbals. Save custom kits. Created by drummers for drummers.
detailed_description:
A realistic style highly customizable drum kit simulator made by drummers for drummers. Used by beginners and professional session drummers. Practice drumming, patterns, fills and more. Start covering your favorite songs, or drum at all hours of the night in the privacy of virtual reality (headphones optional).

Drum kits are highly customizable, change drum heads, shell options, head tuning and more. All your applied settings will save when you save your kit. There are multiple save slots to save multiple kit creations.

In-game audio and video player allows you to load your favorite music right from your PC and play along to it in-game. Use the video player to load up your music videos or drum tab lesions to play along with, play any MP4 video.

Included the 3D note highway that allows you to play your Clone Hero drum charts, or any .chart drum files on the 3D note highway.

  • Pressure sensitive hits.

  • Save multiple kits, backup or share the single save file.

  • Unlimited instrument spawning, drag 'n drop or use the prebuilt drum kits.

  • PC controllers, keyboard and mouse, XBOX, PlayStation, arcade sticks, many hardware devices will work in-game as pedals. See website for more.

  • Spawn standard drums, cymbals and more, even electronic kit drum pads.

  • LIV support for use with your own VR avatars or custom VR setups.

  • Positioned drum kit comes already setup. Modify it to your liking or clear it and start from scratch.

  • In-game audio and video players.

  • Use optional USB foot pedal hardware for bass and hi-hat pedals or use the default VR controller buttons. Plenty of ways to get a physical hardware foot pedal working or rig up your own, see the website for pedal help.

    In-game bass pedals. (Now with double bass)

  • Add drums, cymbals, cowbells, splashes, china. Position them where you want.

  • Comes stock with all the gear most drummers want and more. 15+ snare drums, 8+ bass drums, 8+ crash cymbals, 6 ride cymbals, 6 different splash cymbals, tom drums with multiple tom drum heads for different sounds. Roto toms, tube toms, chimes, 6 different hi-hats (rock, 50's and metal thrash), china cymbals, china stacks, mounted tambourine, and more.

  • Save the position and settings of everything on your kit and scene, load it back-in next time you play.

  • Over 90 drumming sounds and pitch effects to make more.

  • Controller haptic force feedback. (Option to enable)

  • Attention gone into creating realistic looking drums, cymbals, textures and realistic finishes.

  • For fun you can play drum charts on the 3d or 2d highway. (.chart files, example: Clone Hero, Moonscraper Chart Editor, Feedback Chart Editor, etc.)

  • Realistic instrumental sounds.

Multiple hardware hi-hats. Close it, strike it open or closed. Use your VR controllers or connect a physical USB foot pedal or gamepad device.

Custom Art Packs: Image templates are included to create custom art packs, drum sticks and more, for your drum kits. Use your favorite image editor to paint or paste any images onto the templates, your art packs can be loaded in-game or by others you share them with. Creating art packs does not require you own the base game. See the website for more information and to download the image templates.

Technical Information
Will VR Drums Ultimate Streamer work with my VR headset?

The app is programmed to track headsets and devices that support OpenXR and has been tested on multiple PC's and different devices. Please see below for devices that are compatible with XR. Join Discord for other player videos or help.

✔🟢Oculus -- Compatible

✔🟢Meta Quest -- Steam with Meta Quest Link

✔🟢Vive -- Compatible

✔🟢Valve Index -- Compatible

✔🟢Pico -- SteamVR OpenXR -- In Testing

📜Game Manual is listed on the sidebar, click "Visit the website" link.
Personal thanks to testing team and anyone that has helped.
